seo.title: Abs + Booty Burn with Jordan Morello
seo.description: Get the Abs + Booty you've been dreaming of!

trainers.bioBodi: Known jokingly as "the butt guy" on social media for his glute-crushing power moves, he's fast earning another reputation as "the abs guy." Certified in both fitness nutrition and personal training, Jordan is an ACE-certified trainer and has helped thousands of clients reach their health and fitness goals.

data.descriptionShort: Get the Abs + Booty you've been dreaming of!
data.descriptionLong: Ready to work your ABS and BOOTY? Grab some dumbbells, find 25 minutes to break a sweat, burn some fat, and let's work your body head to toe. You’re going to love the results!

modules.title: Is Abs + Booty Burn Right For Me?
modules.content: Abs + Booty Burn is for anyone looking to get visible abs and booty results in just 25-minutes a day. Jordan's charm will entertain you, while his workouts keep your body challenged so you reach your goals.

modules.title: What Are Jordan's Workouts Like?
modules.content: Part HIIT, part strength training, Jordan’s workouts focus on the abs and booty but really deliver total body results. His workouts are really unique — chances are, you’ve never done abs and booty moves quite like the ones you’ll do with Jordan. Best of all his fun style and personality makes the time fly by.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

trainers.bio: Known jokingly as "the butt guy" on social media for his glute-crushing power moves, he's fast earning another reputation as "the abs guy." Certified in both fitness nutrition and personal training, Jordan is an ACE-certified trainer and has helped thousands of clients reach their health and fitness goals.
